function.name: analyze_b_factors
function.description: Calculates and returns the residues with the highest B-factors from a given PDB file. Used to identify structurally unstable hotspots.

pdb_path.description: The file path to the target PDB structure (e.g., 'data/6EQE.pdb')

function.name: find_mutator_candidates
function.description: Calculates the exact Euclidean distance (in Angstroms) between the target hotspot residue and its neighbors to propose salt-bridge or hydrogen-bond mutation candidates.

pdb_path.description: The file path to the target PDB structure.

hotspot_id.description: The residue ID of the target hotspot (e.g., 'A_GLU_292')

radius.description: Search radius in Angstroms to find neighboring residues. Default is 5.0.
